title: Unbelievably Optimised
description: Quality of life mods while preserving frames and the original vanilla minecraft feel.
body:
# **Unbelieveably Optimised**

_This is inspired by the discontinued Simply Optimised_

**PLEASE FOLLOW THIS PROJECT IT HELPS ME A LOT THANKS**

Quality of life while preserving frames and  the original vanilla minecraft feel. 

At least 2gb of ram is recommended. If you can, add up to 4gb of ram, any more is wasted memory

If you don't know how to, watch this tutorial by MelonCube on Youtube.

[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Wu0xQoxo2-8&t=86s](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Wu0xQoxo2-8&t=86s)

Make sure vsync is off + frame limiter off. If you're lagging on a server turn your simulation and/or render distance down
